case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUR OF DEL REV VS HERNANDEZ, SERGIO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUR OF DEL REV RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, SERGIO CRUZ, AMADA AKA AMADA HERNANDEZ $2,787.96 PRINCIPAL, $2,744.59 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,532.55, RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE # 732847. JUDGMENT RENDERED ON OCTOBER 6, 1993. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
